title: Bridge Essay: Mental navigation and the neural mechanisms of insight.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Non-fabrication** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Non-fabrication — spontaneous thought, mind-wandering, DMN, creative insight.
**Phase context:** Spontaneous thought — mind-wandering, DMN, creative insight, involuntary cognition.

**Mental navigation and the neural mechanisms of insight.** — Trends Neurosci (2023). DOI: 10.1016/j.tins.2022.11.002. PMID: 36462993. How do new ideas come about? The central hypothesis presented here states that insights might happen during mental navigation and correspond to rapid plasticity at the cellular level. We highlight the differences between neocortical and hippocampal mechanisms of insight. We argue that the suddenness of insight can be related to the sudden emergence of place fields in the hippocampus.
